flavourText: Builds walls of sound from rhythm and pitch. Name every element to tear them down.
Guards a library of musical masterworks. Prove your analysis skills to unlock its vault.
Invisible but always listening. Identify its instruments and features to reveal its true form.
A blazing furnace of musical ideas. Shape raw sound into structured compositions to quench its fire.
A stone giant that only moves when the music is perfect. Play with precision and expression.
Conjured from synthesisers and sequencers. Master the technology to send it back into the machine.
Waves its baton across centuries of music. Place each era correctly to stop the concert.
Speaks only in Italian terms and musical jargon. Answer in kind to earn its respect.
